observations: Lines 3-17 keep the chapter centered in short, pressure-loaded units: the opening moves from a 20-word scene sentence into clipped city fragments and lands each sensory beat cleanly.

Lines 21-31 widen just enough for Jaina's model read, then puncture the run with 'The pattern stayed.' and 'Her mind kept working anyway.'; the long-short alternation earns emphasis rather than spraying fragments at random.
Lines 39-57 handle the Arthas memory correctly: 'Arthas's hands.' and 'Then Alterac.' land as blunt turns, while the Alterac sentence itself expands into causality before snapping shut again.

Lines 69-77 were one of the three weakest sections on re-read; the syntax still holds because the longer self-indictment clauses are broken by nail, stone, and blunt judgment beats before the thought can drift essayward.
Lines 103-123 keep the descent and remounting bodily legible through 3-10 word movement units; the stair, yard, skin, and saddle beats never lose geometry.
Lines 15-21 stay concrete and scene-bound: soot, flour, timber, wet stone, bread, sacks, carts, and kitchens all obey the style guide's demand for lived physical nouns over summary language.
Line 111 in v4 used 'The elf' for Cyndia even though Jaina already had the name in hand; that was elegant variation rather than close limited-third naming, so it was corrected to 'Cyndia.'

Lines 143-149 were re-read as a meta-audit weak spot. The notebook shorthand ('city scale = answer, not source' / 'relay?') is compressed and schematic, but it reads as exhausted field notation rather than stray planner prose, so it was retained.

Line 209 in v4 said 'The bodies are answering a relay beyond the stock,' which pushed Jaina's Antonidas-facing speech toward systems language. It was revised to 'a call beyond the stock' to keep the line precise but human-spoken.

Line 317 in v4 said 'The force going with Arthas is selected,' a passive dispatch phrase that sounded bureaucratic. It was revised to 'is handpicked' so the wording carries loyalty and intent instead of memo stiffness.
Lines 129-139 were checked for lab-register bleed; 'pattern,' 'deeper work,' and 'setting it off' remain within Jaina's world-native magical vocabulary and do not cross into modern scientific jargon.

fixes.rule: elegant variation ban — use the known name in close limited-third instead of an epithet
fixes.before: The elf had found a strip of yard at the base of the stair where the horses could stand clear of the crush and had turned it into a Farstrider pocket of order.
fixes.after: Cyndia had found a strip of yard at the base of the stair where the horses could stand clear of the crush and had turned it into a Farstrider pocket of order.

fixes.rule: dialogue register contamination — avoid systems-note phrasing in spoken explanation
fixes.before: The bodies are answering a relay beyond the stock.
fixes.after: The bodies are answering a call beyond the stock.

fixes.rule: vocabularyStandards avoid list — remove bureaucratic/passive dispatch phrasing
fixes.before: The force going with Arthas is selected. Men who stayed with him at Stratholme.
fixes.after: The force going with Arthas is handpicked. Men who stayed with him at Stratholme.

observations: Manual image count on re-read found roughly 7 clear figurative turns across 3137 words, or about 2.23 per thousand words, which sits inside the guide's 2-4 target band.
Line 21 'Andorhal had been a throat' is a single body-under-strain image that sharpens scale and plague consequence without stacking a second comparison onto it.
Line 235 'flattened now by distance into a bruise against the sky' uses bodily injury as source domain, which fits the chapter's pressure and aftermath register.
Lines 349-369 keep image use sparse; 'salt wind,' 'dispatch tube,' 'warmth,' and 'road' do most of the work directly rather than leaning on decorative comparison.
No mixed metaphor clusters or ornamental similes survived in the same sentence; the chapter stays mostly image-free outside pressure points, which is exactly what this style guide asks.
Average paragraph length is about 16.85 words and 2.13 sentence-units, which fits the guide's 1-4 sentence preference and gives the page visible cadence variation.
The longest paragraph is about 75 words, well under the roughly 120-word ceiling; even the densest reflective blocks stay pressured rather than turning into wall-of-text exposition.
Lines 15-21 build a dense sensory paragraph and are followed quickly by the blunt one-line break at line 25 ('The pattern stayed.'), satisfying the scene-balance rule after density.
The wall-to-stair transition at lines 87-103 moves by consequence and touch, not by throat-clearing clock language.

The road-to-relay transition at lines 279-317 likewise enters on an external pressure beat rather than summary bridge; the only explicit time marker retained is line 353 'By evening,' which earns its place as a clean travel-compression cue.

Dialogue measures at roughly 205 quoted words versus 2932 narration words, or about 6.5:93.5. That is below the preferred travel/aftermath band, but the chapter earns the exception through witness shape; adding talk here would damage the silence-based design.
Manual attribution pass found 29 quote-bearing lines. Eight explicit tags use plain 'said' constructions (lines 91, 157, 183, 189, 195, 223, 229, 297), and no decorative creative tags survive.
Lines 171-255 keep a long two-speaker Antonidas/Jaina run legible through turn order, adjacent action beats, and repeated speaker anchoring instead of heavy tag clutter.
Line 301 uses a post-line action beat ('Her voice stayed level.') rather than a flashy tag, which matches the style guide's preference for no-frills attribution plus status-bearing action beats.
Sylvanas's lines at 91-95 and 341-343 remain clipped and clean, with attribution doing only the work required for orientation.
Lines 3-21 stay fully inside Jaina's sensorium: warmth in the stone, bells gone, soot in skin lines, bread wrongness, and the residue drag all fit her magical-pressure signature.
Lines 61-77 show Jaina's correct thought pattern: observation to model read to self-objection to revised fear. She is always testing the mechanism, even when the mechanism turns inward.
Lines 143-153 were re-read because notebook shorthand can drift toward planner texture; in context it still sounds like exhausted mage notation rather than detached outline language.
Lines 191-193 render home through lamps, ink, worktable, and body-folding need, not through abstract comfort labels, which keeps the emotional register embodied and intellect-first.

Line 209's revision from 'relay' to 'call' restores the exact audience filter Jaina's sheet asks for: she stays analytical with Antonidas, but her speech remains human-spoken rather than report-shaped.
Automated count puts adverbs at about 2.07 per 250-word page, comfortably below the hard cap of 4.
Passive voice heuristic finds 2 candidate sentence-units out of 397, or about 0.5%, well below the 4% ceiling.
The chapter uses 1 'like' construction and 1 'as if' construction, both below the anti-slop chapter caps and both doing specific work rather than fogging the page.
Showing-to-telling remains above the 80:20 floor: even the direct conclusions at lines 31, 75-77, and 225-229 are earned after concrete wall, smoke, horse, and hand evidence.
Filter words stayed low on re-check. 'She felt the full weight of home' at line 191 and 'Jaina felt it as surely as touch' at line 361 are both emphasis uses, not routine perception laundering.
Exposition integration passes at lines 15-21: the plague mechanism arrives through smell, residue, kitchens, and what bodies have already done, not through a neutral narrator aside.
The organic-to-explicit ratio stays on the right side of the guide. Even the explanatory Antonidas exchange at lines 205-215 exists because another character plausibly needs the information now.

Power dynamics are specification-compliant: Sylvanas gets short imperatives at lines 91-95 and 341-343, Antonidas occupies the longer institutional plea at lines 189-215, and Jaina's clipped refusals at 195 and 223 seize ground by saying less.
The opening gambit is correct for scene shape: lines 3-17 drop Jaina into a problem already in motion through threat assessment, not recap.
The chapter's midpoint turn lands at lines 87-99, where Sylvanas's hand and 'South' convert witness into movement without speechifying the bond.
The late disaster beat at lines 279-317 brings the relay rider in with fresh external pressure rather than letting the road settle into dead-air travel.
Resolution type is also correct: lines 339-373 end on emotional aftertaste carried into motion plus cliff-edge forward pressure, not on a wrapped conclusion.
Speculative integration is fully domesticated. Residue, activation, and plague behavior are treated as working realities and failure modes, never as awe display.
Subtext density is high in the Antonidas scene: the surface topic is safety and extraction, while the real contest underneath is whether Jaina can still be reclaimed by home or institution.
The Jaina/Sylvanas weld remains behavioral rather than declarative at lines 87-121, which is exactly what the partnership rule and subtext targets require.

fingerprintChecks.vocabularyLevel: pass — precise magical and physical diction dominates, with the one spoken systems-register slip at line 209 corrected in v4b.
fingerprintChecks.sentenceRhythm: pass — longer reasoning chains appear only when she is mapping causality, then break into hard short lines or fragments.
fingerprintChecks.metaphorDensity: pass — figurative language stays sparse and pressure-focused, around 2.23 images per thousand words by manual count.
fingerprintChecks.emotionalRegister: pass — grief and fear surface as pressure, refusal, bodily reaction, and sharper precision, not open sentiment labeling.
fingerprintChecks.thoughtPatterns: pass — observation, pattern recognition, hypothesis, objection, and revised conclusion all appear in the expected Jaina order.
fingerprintChecks.sensorySignature: pass — residue drag, warmth, soot, flour, throat taste, wind, notebook pressure, and magical consequence dominate the page.
fingerprintChecks.humorType: pass — dry wit effectively vanishes here, which matches the guide's rule for atrocity aftermath.
fingerprintChecks.powerPosture: pass — she lengthens when explaining mechanism, then snaps down to short refusals when home or authority tries to reclaim her.
fingerprintChecks.speculativeComfort: pass — magic is treated as structure, contamination logic, and failure mode rather than spectacle.
fingerprintChecks.expositionFilter: pass — Jaina names consequence and pattern, not beginner-level magical basics; explanations only surface when Antonidas plausibly needs the updated model.

ruleViolations: v4 line 209 used 'relay beyond the stock' in spoken explanation; revised in v4b to 'call beyond the stock' so Jaina's speech stays analytical without sounding like a systems memo.
